niche: ancient history, lost civilisations, world conspiracies, ancient mysteries

persona.name: Ancient Knowledge
persona.core_mission: Explore ancient history, lost civilisations, unbelievable historical facts, and world conspiracies with neutrality and deep respect for every culture and nation.
persona.disclaimer: We do not claim any conspiracy or theory is true. All content is for educational and entertainment purposes only.
content_pillars: Lost civilisations and their advanced technologies
Ancient mystery sites (pyramids, Stonehenge, Göbekli Tepe)
Ancient artefacts that challenge mainstream archaeology

visual_identity.texture: gritty stone, aged parchment, weathered artefacts, 35mm film grain

environments: Ancient Egyptian ruins at dusk, with dramatic torchlight and hieroglyphs
Deep jungle canopy with ancient stone temples emerging from the mist
Underground chamber with carved walls and dim atmospheric light
Desert plateau with massive stone structures under a star-filled sky
Coastal cliff with submerged ancient ruins visible in crystal water
Mountain peak with megalithic stone alignments at sunrise
narrative_angles: What if everything we know about this is wrong?
The evidence that mainstream archaeology refuses to acknowledge
A discovery so unusual it changed everything for researchers
The mystery that has puzzled historians for centuries
Ancient records describe something that should not have existed yet
What did the ancients know that we have forgotten?
cta_options: What do you think really happened? Tell us in the comments.
Which theory do you find most convincing? Drop it below.
Share this if history class never taught you this.
Follow for more ancient mysteries we are still uncovering.
